text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Die <BIBL><TITLE>Mangoldische Bibel</TITLE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR></BIBL>. Die <BIBL><TITLE>Jelische Lexicon</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stettlers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Schweitzer-Chronick</TITLE>, das <TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE></BIBL>, samt noch einigen anderen neuen frantzösisch historischen Büucheren, davon der Catalogus bey Herrn M. Daniel Meyer im Collegio zu sehen ist, als welcher diese Bücher zu verkauffen in Commission hat.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":6,"explanation":"Corrections made: (1) Closed the third BIBL element which was left open after the two TITLE tags (Stettlers Schweitzer-Chronick / Reich der Todten), fixing the tag structure. (2) Removed erroneous space/hyphen break in \"Schweitzer- Chronick\" to form \"Schweitzer-Chronick\". (3) Fixed corrupted unicode escape \"frantz\\u221a\\u2202sisch\" to \"frantzösisch\". (4) Fixed corrupted unicode escape \"B\\u221a\\u00bacheren\" to \"Bücheren\". (5) Fixed corrupted unicode escape \"B\\u221a\\u00bacher\" to \"Bücher\". (6) Fixed broken word \"Commi- \\u221a\\u00fcion\" (corrupted hyphenation and unicode) to \"Commission\"."}

parsed.explanation: Corrections made: (1) Closed the third BIBL element which was left open after the two TITLE tags (Stettlers Schweitzer-Chronick / Reich der Todten), fixing the tag structure. (2) Removed erroneous space/hyphen break in "Schweitzer- Chronick" to form "Schweitzer-Chronick". (3) Fixed corrupted unicode escape "frantz\u221a\u2202sisch" to "frantzösisch". (4) Fixed corrupted unicode escape "B\u221a\u00bacheren" to "Bücheren". (5) Fixed corrupted unicode escape "B\u221a\u00bacher" to "Bücher". (6) Fixed broken word "Commi- \u221a\u00fcion" (corrupted hyphenation and unicode) to "Commission".
